requirement_topic.en: Palau Market Access — MPIC, MPIC, PPUC and Nascent EV Deployment
requirement_topic.zh: 巴劳市场准入——MPIC、MPIC、PPUC及起步阶段电动汽车部署
requirement_topic.zht: 巴勞市場准入——MPIC、MPIC、PPUC及起步階段電動汽車部署

summary.en: The Ministry of Public Infrastructure, Industries & Commerce is the national standards body, MPIC regulates utilities and communications, and Palau Public Utilities Corporation (PPUC) is the main electricity utility. The EV charging market is nascent, so exporters should not assume that a single mature EVSE certification rule covers every product. Instead, market entry should be mapped by importer, HS code, charger type, rated voltage, radio functions, utility connection, site permits, labelling, safety evidence, and project-owner requirements. Public, hotel, fleet, marina, and government installations may impose different procurement conditions.
summary.zh: Ministry of Public Infrastructure, Industries & Commerce是巴劳国家标准机构，MPIC监管公用事业和通信，Palau Public Utilities Corporation (PPUC)是主要电力公司。巴劳电动汽车充电市场仍处于起步阶段，出口商不应假设已有单一成熟EVSE认证规则覆盖所有产品。市场准入应按进口商、HS编码、充电桩类型、额定电压、无线功能、公用事业接入、现场许可、标签、安全证据和项目业主要求逐项映射。公共、酒店、车队、码头和政府安装可能提出不同采购条件。
summary.zht: Ministry of Public Infrastructure, Industries & Commerce是巴勞國家標準機構，MPIC監管公用事業和通訊，Palau Public Utilities Corporation (PPUC)是主要電力公司。巴勞電動汽車充電市場仍處於起步階段，出口商不應假設已有單一成熟EVSE認證規則覆蓋所有產品。市場准入應按進口商、HS編碼、充電樁類型、額定電壓、無線功能、公用事業接入、現場許可、標籤、安全證據和項目業主要求逐項映射。公共、酒店、車隊、碼頭和政府安裝可能提出不同採購條件。

standards_or_laws: Ministry of Public Infrastructure, Industries & Commerce standards and conformity-assessment context
MPIC utilities and communications regulatory context
Palau Public Utilities Corporation (PPUC) project and service connection requirements
Importer, customs, tender, and site-owner requirements for EV charging equipment

summary.en: China-market chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930 communication for DC charging, and China domestic conformity or grid-acceptance requirements. These documents may support engineering review but do not establish Palau market access, PPUC connection acceptance, MPIC radio acceptance, or project procurement approval.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流充电GB/T 27930通信，以及中国国内合格评定或并网验收要求准备文件。这些文件可支持工程审查，但不能证明巴劳市场准入、PPUC接入验收、MPIC无线电接受或项目采购批准。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流充電GB/T 27930通訊，以及中國國內合格評定或併網驗收要求準備文件。這些文件可支持工程審查，但不能證明巴勞市場准入、PPUC接入驗收、MPIC無線電接受或項目採購批准。

gap.en: Before claiming Palau readiness, exporters should confirm the importer of record, customs classification, MPIC standards route, MPIC requirements for wireless modules, PPUC connection process, local electrical contractor role, J1772 / CCS1 connector specification, 120/240 V 60 Hz revalidation, hurricane-prone outdoor installation evidence, and project-specific documentation. China CCC, CQC, or GB/T files alone should not be presented as a Palau approval.
gap.zh: 在宣称充电桩适用于巴劳前，出口商应确认进口记录方、海关归类、MPIC标准路径、无线模块MPIC要求、PPUC接入流程、当地电气承包商角色、J1772 / CCS1接口规格、120/240 V 60 Hz重新验证、飓风多发户外安装证据，以及项目特定文件。中国CCC、CQC或GB/T文件本身不应被表述为巴劳批准。
gap.zht: 在宣稱充電樁適用於巴勞前，出口商應確認進口記錄方、海關歸類、MPIC標準路徑、無線模組MPIC要求、PPUC接入流程、當地電氣承包商角色、J1772 / CCS1接口規格、120/240 V 60 Hz重新驗證、颶風多發戶外安裝證據，以及項目特定文件。中國CCC、CQC或GB/T文件本身不應被表述為巴勞批准。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — exact product conformity, import, utility, telecom, and project requirements must be verified with MPIC, MPIC, PPUC, customs, importer, and project owner for the specific charger and HS code
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic certification and GB/T evidence are not Palau market-access approvals

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The Palau EV charging market is nascent, so do not rely on a generic GB/T or China certification package. Map MPIC, MPIC, PPUC, customs, importer, and project requirements for the exact charger before quoting or shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴劳电动汽车充电市场仍处于起步阶段，不应依赖通用GB/T或中国认证资料包。报价或发货前，应针对具体充电桩映射MPIC、MPIC、PPUC、海关、进口商和项目要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴勞電動汽車充電市場仍處於起步階段，不應依賴通用GB/T或中國認證資料包。報價或發貨前，應針對具體充電樁映射MPIC、MPIC、PPUC、海關、進口商和項目要求。
